categories.category: หมวดงานอื่นๆ

items.description: หมวดงานอื่นๆ (ถ้ามี) เพื่อให้ครบถ้วนตามรูปแบบและรายการ

warnings: This PNG is a SINGLE physical portrait sheet, NOT a double-sheet landscape scan like every other page in the 38-47 batch - re-confirmed independently on this t4 pass by viewing the full unsplit image: it is one table rotated 90 degrees with a single title block, single sheet-number footer, and only one doc_page number, unlike pages 38-46 which each contain two independent title blocks/footers side by side (the right half of the landscape canvas is genuinely blank white space, not a cropped/missing second sheet). No _1/_2 split needed; this is the only file for page 47.

This is the FINAL sheet (19/19) of the entire 19-sheet BOQ book for this house's ฐานรากแผ่ variant - confirms the historically-never-extracted 38-47 gap closes here with no spillover onto a page 48+; a later, separately-tracked BOQ variant (a different foundation type) is understood to begin around page 48 per prior extraction rounds, not part of this task.

The entire material table on this sheet is printed completely blank below the single header row - item 5 'หมวดงานอื่นๆ (ถ้ามี)...' ('other work categories, if any, to ensure completeness per the drawings and BOQ') is a contingency placeholder category from the page 38 cover/summary sheet that was evidently not used for this specific house design. No total row is printed either (the whole table, including where a total row would normally appear, is empty) - transcribed as-is, not fabricated.

doc_page=45 was directly read from a clear, unambiguous 2-digit corner crop on this sheet (not inferred) - this is the second of the two directly-confirmed anchor points (the other being page 38's doc_page=36) used to infer doc_page for pages 39-46 via the linear relationship doc_page = png_page - 2.

Independent re-read (t4, 2026-07-08 schema round) matches t3's transcription exactly - single-sheet structure, single item row, blank table confirmed. No disagreement found. Only wrapper-level addition vs t3 is the new mandatory source_image field.
